attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Torbjørn Heggem (Norway).
Attempt missed. Aymen Hussein (Iraq) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left following a set piece situation.
Foul by Alexander Sørloth (Norway).
Foul by Julian Ryerson (Norway).
Kristoffer Ajer (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Aymen Hussein.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门偏出。 艾门·侯赛因参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Sander Berge (Norway) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Ibrahim Bayesh.
Attempt missed. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Julian Ryerson with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 哈兰德射门偏出。 朱利安·瑞尔森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Antonio Nusa (Norway) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Alexander Sørloth (Norway) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julian Ryerson with a cross.

events.description: 亚历山大·索罗斯射门被封堵。 朱利安·瑞尔森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by David Møller Wolfe (Norway).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Zaid Tahseen (Iraq) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left following a set piece situation.

events.description: 扎伊德·塔森射门偏出。 阿卡姆哈希姆参与进攻。

events.description: 哈兰德 进球，大卫·莫勒·沃尔夫 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Alexander Sørloth (Norway) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Erling Haaland.

events.description: 亚历山大·索罗斯射门被封堵。 哈兰德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Hussein Ali.
Foul by Sander Berge (Norway).
Alexander Sørloth (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by David Møller Wolfe (Norway).
Attempt missed. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Alexander Sørloth.

events.description: 厄德高射门偏出。 亚历山大·索罗斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Alexander Sørloth (Norway).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 艾门·侯赛因 进球，阿米尔·阿马里 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Erling Haaland (Norway) right footed shot from very close range is saved in the centre of the goal by Jalal Hassan (Iraq).
Handball by Zaid Ismael (Iraq).
Foul by David Møller Wolfe (Norway).
Foul by Erling Haaland (Norway).
Attempt missed. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) with an attempt from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Merchas Doski with a cross.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门偏出。 梅尔查斯·多斯基参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ibrahim Bayesh (Iraq) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is blocked. Assisted by Ali Al Hamadi.

events.description: 伊布拉希姆·巴耶什射门被封堵。 阿里·阿尔哈马迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Iraq. Conceded by David Møller Wolfe.
Attempt missed. Zaid Tahseen (Iraq) header from the left side of the six yard box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Amir Al Ammari with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 扎伊德·塔森射门偏出。 阿米尔·阿马里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ali Jasim with a through ball.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门被封堵。 阿里·贾西姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Iraq. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Attempt missed. Akam Hashim (Iraq) left footed shot from outside the box is too high following a corner.

events.description: 阿卡姆哈希姆射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Iraq 1, Norway 2.
Second Half begins Iraq 1, Norway 2.
Offside, Iraq. Hussein Ali is caught offside.
David Møller Wolfe (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Aymen Hussein (Iraq) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ibrahim Bayesh with a cross.

events.description: 艾门·侯赛因射门偏出。 伊布拉希姆·巴耶什参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Martin Ødegaard (Norway) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Antonio Nusa (Norway) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Akam Hashim.
Delay in match because of an injury Ali Jasim (Iraq).
